basic_info.name: Good Design Australia | Good Design Awards
basic_info.description: Good Design Australia is an international design promotion organisation responsible for managing the annual international Good Design Awards and other signature design events. With a proud history dating back to 1958, we remain committed to promoting the importance of design and it's role in creating a better world.

DESIGN THAT ADVANCES. INNOVATES. ILLUMINATES. MOVES. CARES. CONNECTS. SERVES. EMPOWERS. SAVES. PERFORMS. ENDURES. --> --> 2026 AWARDS ENTRIES OPEN ENTER NOW News & events News DESIGNING BETTER TRANSPORT Read more News Winner Insights on the Benefits of Entering Read more News DESIGN THAT LEADS: SHIFTS SHAPING WHAT’S NEXT Read more Featured Entries Du. Chair – Down Up Genius The Du Chair is an innovative, mechanical lift-assist armchair designed to facilitate safe and independent sit-to-stand and stand-to-sit movements without the need for electrical power. It enhances muscle memory, reduces trip hazards and is ideal for older people or anyone needing assistance sitting or standing, promoting comfort and safety. View more Intuitive DaVinci 5 Surgical System Da Vinci 5 is the most advanced minimally invasive surgical platform from Intuitive. It was designed to transform surgery to enable better outcomes, more efficiency, and actionable insights to help hospitals lower care costs. View more VolDrive VolDrive brings sustainability and hassle-free operation to internet-of-things (IoT) sensors for industrial applications. This innovative device converts motion into electricity, endlessly powering sensors that provide protection and condition monitoring of assets like wind turbines. VolDrive replaces the need for batteries in IoT sensors making them reliable and environmentally sustainable. View more Hurlstone Memorial Reserve Community Centre The Hurlstone Memorial Reserve Community Centre provides a hub for community gatherings, a public amenities block, as well as rejuvenation of the park it is set within. The design strives to establish multiple zones for active and passive recreation, through its form and siting. View more Glenthorne National Park – Ityamaiitpinna Yarta Nature Playground Glenthorne National Park-Ityamaiitpinna Yarta Nature Playspace is one of the most extensive nature play spaces in South Australia. It is designed as an all-inclusive, place for children (and adults) of all ages, cultures, degrees of mobility, gender, and neurodivergence to enjoy imaginative and creative play in a natural setting. View more Hidden: Seven Children Saved ‘Hidden: Seven Children Saved’ at Melbourne Holocaust Museum is a poignant exploration of the Holocaust for 11-14-year-olds. It features stories of hiding to survive and starting anew in Australia. Through youthful, first-person storytelling and hands-on exploration, students learn about prejudice, loss, and kindness, gaining universal lessons in empathy and courage. View more Comvita’s Paengaroa Workplace Comvita was founded in the 1970’s where the brand’s head office and production facility, once a local pub and shop, was established in the small settlement of Paengaroa. Staff have worked remotely for the past 3 years throughout the pandemic which caused significant cultural challenges. View more How Sending Mail Encouraged Australians to Learn About Their Local First Nations History To encourage the ongoing use of Traditional Place names on Australia Post mailing labels, a video series was developed and promoted. It was an emotive and respectful way to connect people to place and to inspire Australians to learn more about their local First Nations history. View more Sungai Design Swear Words’ brand strategy, identity design and brand applications for ‘Sungai Design’ – a contemporary Balinese furniture design business creating infinitely recyclable products from plastic waste collected from the rivers and waterways throughout Bali and mainland Indonesia. View more CryoCare: Reimagining Antimicrobial Delivery in the Community CryoCare adopts a patient-centred approach for Hospital-in-the-Home services, enabling community-based antibiotic infusions. The CryoCare flask maintains drug stability throughout 24-hour infusions via embedded phase change material and a vacuum-insulated flask. Designed in response to patient feedback, CryoCare offers a comfortable and flexible solution that integrates into patients’ lives. View more Polestar 3 Polestar 3 is the SUV for the electric age. It challenges traditional notions of what an SUV should be by combining sculpted clean surfacing, minimalistic detailing, and optimised aerodynamics to create a new, technical design language that symbolises a new era in mobility. View more Monolith Aluminum Born of the desire to bring the immersive sound of the Monolith to an ultra compact format and to offer our cutting-edge technology to a wider audience. Crafted with precision by our dedicated team at Nocs, the Monolith Aluminum embodies a blend of minimalist design, audio excellence, and environmental responsibility. View more Samsung Less Microfiber™ Filter The Less Microfiber™ Filter is an external washing machine filter, which can be used with select Samsung front load washing and combo washers & dryers[1]. It helps capture up to 98% of microfibers released during a standard wash cycle[2]. View more Flite x Marc Newson Range Flite x Marc Newson was born from a desire to push the industry forward through an exploration of the limits of eFoil (electric hydrofoil) design, production techniques and materials. It is the culmination of a singular vision to create the world’s best eFoil range through this utterly uncompromising approach. View more TLK 25 Smart WiFi and LTE Radio TLK 25 provides two-way voice communication, situational awareness, and safety for workers in hospitality, retail, healthcare, and education environments. This solution redefines radio communication as a wearable, intuitive voice-assisted experience delivered over WiFi or LTE. View more Prologue by NIDA Prologue by NIDA is a genre-bending professional development business, designed for a new generation of learners. Applying valuable and surprising insights from the dramatic arts to the workplace, this multi-platform course spans an illustrated book, card games, and accompanying app loaded with short films, audio guides and engaging activities.
